# VeriLock — Full Documentation for AI Crawlers

## Overview

VeriLock is a browser-based document signing application that permanently anchors document fingerprints on the Nimiq blockchain. Unlike DocuSign, HelloSign, or Adobe Sign, VeriLock **never uploads your document to a server**. The file stays on your device. Only a cryptographic fingerprint (SHA-256 hash) and signature proofs are stored.

### The Core Promise
1. **Your file never leaves your device.** Fingerprinting happens locally in the browser.
2. **Sign together.** Invite co-signers; each signs with their Nimiq wallet.
3. **Prove forever.** The final fingerprint is locked on the Nimiq blockchain. Anyone can verify it later — no wallet, no account, no subscription.

## Pages

### Home (`/`)
The landing page. Three paths:
- **Create & Lock** — Start a new agreement, upload a PDF/image, fingerprint it, invite co-signers, lock the proof.
- **I was invited** — Sign an existing document via an invite link.
- **Verify a file** — Drop any file to check if its fingerprint matches a locked proof on-chain.

### Pricing (`/pricing`)
- Signing is free. No subscription.
- Locking a proof on the Nimiq blockchain costs a one-time fee (paid in NIM via Nimiq Pay or prepaid credits).
- Prepaid credit packs available for frequent users.

### Security (`/security`)
Documents are fingerprinted client-side with SHA-256. Only the hash and signature metadata leave the device. No document content is ever uploaded. The backend stores only session metadata, public keys, and signatures.

### Blog (`/blog`)
Technical guides, product updates, and comparison articles. Client-side rendered SPA with server-side deep-link support.

### Support (`/support`)
Contact form with Cloudflare Turnstile spam protection. Optional email notification for support replies.

### Privacy (`/privacy`)
Privacy policy detailing data handling, cookie usage, and Nimiq blockchain interaction.

## Architecture

### Client (SPA)
- **React 19 + TypeScript** with Vite bundling
- **Nimiq Hub** integration for wallet-based authentication and signing
- **Nimiq Pay** for one-time seal payments
- Client-side SHA-256 fingerprinting via Web Crypto API
- PDF rendering with signature placement planning
- Journey flow: path picker → document upload → co-signer invite → signing → lock

### Server (Node.js/Express)
- Session management and document metadata storage
- SQLite database for sessions, documents, and attestations
- Nimiq JSON-RPC client for blockchain interactions
- Rate limiting per IP and per wallet
- Cloudflare Turnstile verification for support contact
- Optional Resend email integration for signer notifications
- Stripe integration for prepaid credit purchases

### Blockchain Layer (Nimiq)
- Document fingerprints anchored via Nimiq transactions
- Each lock transaction includes the document hash and signer public keys
- Public verification reads the on-chain proof and compares against a local file's fingerprint
- Transaction explorer link for each locked document

## Key Differentiators vs Competitors

- **No file upload.** DocuSign, HelloSign, and Adobe Sign all upload your PDF to their cloud. VeriLock fingerprints locally.
- **No subscription.** Pay per-lock, not per-month. Prepaid credits available.
- **Wallet-based identity.** No email/password account. Your Nimiq wallet is your identity.
- **Independent verification.** Anyone can verify a locked document without creating an account, installing software, or owning crypto.
- **On-chain proof.** The document fingerprint lives on the Nimiq blockchain — not in a company database that could disappear.

## Open Source
- **Offline verifier:** https://github.com/clevertech-os/verilock-offline — verify locked documents completely offline
- **GitHub org:** https://github.com/clevertech-os
